codeReview.summary: The fix commit resolves the prior browser-executor scrutiny failures: `runExecutor.ts` now captures the initial loaded page, forces final evidence for guardrail/max-step/max-duration/browser-error/abandonment terminal paths, and requests JPEG screenshots explicitly; `executeRunHandler.ts` now generates self-reports for every terminal outcome and includes them in failure reporting. The updated regression coverage exercises the new evidence and callback paths, and I did not find any remaining issues within the scope of these fixes.

summary: Pass on the re-review: commit `875c29d6ade989806063e383d78a7474ae4cf502` fixes the prior blocking browser-executor scrutiny failures around initial/final evidence capture, JPEG screenshot encoding, and failure-path self-reports.
